channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Meta Unveils Movie Gen: AI Tool Creates Realistic Video and Audio Clips
item.description: Meta's new AI model, Movie Gen, generates realistic video and audio clips in response to user prompts, rivaling tools from OpenAI and ElevenLabs.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: The Antitrust Trial: Unpacking Google's Response and the DOJ's Rebuttal | Google vs. US DOJ
item.description: The antitrust trial between Google and the US Department of Justice (DOJ) has reached a critical stage, with both parties presenting their amended findings of fact. In this article, we'll delve into the key aspects of Google's response to the DOJ's allegations and the subsequent rebuttal by the government agency.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Zero Trust Challenges: DoD Agencies Confront Misunderstandings Ahead of 2026 Deadline
item.description: Federal agencies face zero trust challenges as they move towards a secure-by-default configuration, despite the upcoming 2026 deadline to accelerate enterprise cloud adoption for the Defense Department.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
